name: chess-assist
description: A modern, modular chess assistant web application built with ES2024 standards

scripts.test: python -m http.server 8080 & echo 'Tests available at http://localhost:8080/tests/ - Press Ctrl+C to stop server'
scripts.test:open: python -m http.server 8080 & sleep 2 && echo 'Opening tests in browser...' && (command -v open >/dev/null && open http://localhost:8080/tests/) || (command -v xdg-open >/dev/null && xdg-open http://localhost:8080/tests/) || echo 'Open http://localhost:8080/tests/ in your browser'

author: Roger Aparecido Silva
